Understands; "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
152 C7 C7_CHANGE_IN_COMM (C7) Change in Communication/Hearing CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: change in communication/hearing. 0 = No change, 1 = Improved, 2 = Deteriorated. "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
153 D1 D1_VISION (D1) Vision CHAR 1 Vision Patterns: vision. 0 = Adequate - sees fine detail, including regular print in newspapers/bookds; 1 = Impaired - sees larged print, but not regular print in newspapers/books; 2= Moderately Impaired - limited
